scripts.data:schedule:daily: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/install-data-task.ps1 -Mode Daily -At 06:30 -TaskName "Fiscaliza Varginha - Atualizacao diaria"
scripts.data:schedule:watch: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/install-data-task.ps1 -Mode Watch -IntervalMinutes 180 -OnlyIfChanged -SkipTests -SkipPackage -TaskName "Fiscaliza Varginha - Vigia de dados"
scripts.release: npm run data:indice && npm run lint:syntax && npm run validate:data && npm test && npm run deploy:zip && npm run validate:deploy
scripts.validate:data: npm run data:audit && npm run data:snapshot && npm run data:bundle && node scripts/validate-release.mjs data
